## Motivation

## Proposed tool(s)

<!-- Be specific about the verb and inputs/outputs. Remember the tool surface cap (~15-25 verbs) — consolidation is preferred over new tools. -->

- Name: `discover_something(log_id, ...)` -> ...
- Returns: handle + summary (never raw logs/DataFrames)

## Phase alignment

<!-- Which roadmap phase does this belong to? If it's in a later phase, explain why it should be pulled forward. -->

- [ ] Phase 1 — core traditional-log toolkit
- [ ] Phase 2 — OCEL 2.0 / advanced analytics
- [ ] Phase 3 — agentic layer (abstractions, prompts, reports)
- [ ] Phase 4 — platform (HTTP, sandboxed exec, connectors)
